description_long: This is a modern rectangular dining table with a polished white marble top featuring subtle gray veining. The table is surrounded by six high-back chairs, each with a dark woven texture and slender metal frames. The chair backs are tall and rectangular, providing a striking vertical accent to the ensemble. The table legs and chair bases are constructed from dark metal, forming geometric, open rectangular shapes that add a contemporary touch. The overall design is sleek and sophisticated, suitable for upscale urban environments. The materials and construction suggest durability and a focus on both aesthetics and comfort.
description: A modern rectangular marble-top dining table with six high-back, dark woven chairs and geometric metal frames, exuding a sleek and sophisticated urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marble tabletop and three high-back chairs facing forward, with the geometric metal bases visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backs of the three chairs and the woven texture, with the marble tabletop edge and metal frames visible.
description_view_2: Top-down angled view displaying the full marble surface and the arrangement of all six chairs around the table.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the backs of the other three chairs and the symmetry of the chair arrangement.
